utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage with physical and mental health insurance and costs, (2) property_coverage with home/contents insurance and costs, (3) travel_coverage with travel insurance and costs, (4) additional_services with enhancement services and costs, and (5) total_budget with overall monthly/annual cost breakdown. In the final plan, all five items—health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget—are present. Each includes appropriate coverage details and cost information. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main policies under the 'VitalPlus Global Family Bundle'—a Health Component, a Property Component, and a Travel Component. In the ground-truth data, the only plans with the 'VitalPlus' name are 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' under health coverage, 'VitalPlus Standard Coverage' under property protection, and 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' under travel insurance. Each of these has a rating of 6. The assistant’s finalized plan directly matches these options (just bundled together). Therefore, each component corresponds to the 'VitalPlus Standard' option with a rating of 6.
